_comment: Story 2.3 Stryker mutation config (SEC-2, DoD-2). Run from packages/ingest: npx stryker run. Targets the state machine gate + crypto verification + attestation. Threshold >=90% score. Mutation targets TC-3.1..TC-3.10 are killed by tests/integration/intake-gate.integration.test.ts (24) + intake-worker.integration.test.ts (6) + tests/contract/intake-boundary.contract.test.ts (6). STR-1: merged from packages/intake.
_concurrency_note: concurrency:1 — keeps mutation runs deterministic for the replay/temporal logic

_targets.TC-3.1: state validation bypass (worker) — killed by TC-1.12/1.13/1.13a/1.13b
_targets.TC-3.2: signer identity comparison bypass — killed by TC-1.2/1.3
_targets.TC-3.3: Tier-5 check bypass — killed by TC-1.8/1.9
_targets.TC-3.4: state transition guard bypass — killed by TC-1.4/1.5/1.6
_targets.TC-3.5: approval window bypass — killed by TC-1.16
_targets.TC-3.6: inter-signature delay bypass — killed by TC-1.17
_targets.TC-3.7: idempotent extraction bypass — killed by TC-1.11
_targets.TC-3.8: audit event emission bypass — killed by TC-1.1/1.12/1.18
_targets.TC-3.9: key revocation bypass — killed by TC-1.20
